runs.summary: v1.0 baseline generated and cross-model reviewed.

runs.note: No significant Claude Code updates: newest release is v2.1.162 (2026-06-03), already recorded with all its changelog items; no new model, defaults, or official guidance; community sources (HN/Reddit) were low-engagement product posts with no corroborated reproducible technique. Significance rubric not met.

No significant Claude Code updates. GitHub Releases API confirms newest is v2.1.162 (2026-06-03), already in the ledger; v2.1.160/161/162 changelogs are bugfixes and minor UI tweaks (the ultracode rename is already recorded). Anthropic news (Jun 1-3) was corporate (S-1 filing, Partner Network, Project Glasswing), not Claude Code config guidance; Opus 4.8 already recorded. Hacker News stories were low-engagement (1-4 points) Show HN/Ask HN posts with no >=2-source corroborated reproducible technique. Significance rubric not met.

No significant Claude Code updates. GitHub Releases API: newest is still v2.1.162 (2026-06-03), already recorded; v2.1.159-162 are bugfixes and minor UX (e.g. `claude agents --json waitingFor`, `/effort` persistence confirmation, click-to-fill slash commands, Windsurf->Devin Desktop rename, WebFetch/Windows permission-rule fixes). No new release, default model, flag, or config change beyond what is in state.json. Anthropic news (Jun 2-3) was corporate (Claude Partner Network Services Track, AI-cyber-threats report, Project Glasswing, draft S-1); Opus 4.8 already recorded. Hacker News (last 7 days) held only low-engagement (1-10 pts) Show HN/Ask HN product posts and one YC company launch, with no >=2-source corroborated reproducible technique. Reddit and WebSearch were unavailable in CI. Significance rubric not met.
